name: Chunky Clams & Pasta
recipeIngredient: 19 oz. Chunky New England Clam Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the clam chowder, parsley, and garlic powder.
2. Add the cooked spaghetti to the mixture.
3. Heat over medium heat, stirring frequently until everything is heated through.
